entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: Phaseolus vulgaris L., the target crop of the study

entities.name: BEAN COMMON MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that causes severe reduction in yield in common bean

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, which is reduced by BCMV infection

entities.name: STABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of specific common bean genotypes to consistently resist BCMV

entities.name: NATURAL EPIPHYTOTIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where the virus is naturally present for screening

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION
entities.description: A technique used to intentionally infect plants with BCMV for screening

entities.name: REVERSE-TRANSCRIPTION POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A molecular technique used to confirm BCMV infection via gene amplification

entities.name: COAT PROTEIN GENE
entities.description: The specific gene of BCMV used for amplification and identification

entities.name: SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the nucleotide sequence of the amplified coat protein gene

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: A region in India where similar BCMV strains were reported

entities.name: HIMACHAL PRADESH
entities.description: A region in India where similar BCMV strains were reported

entities.name: BCMV-K
entities.description: The specific strain of bean common mosaic virus identified in the study
